title: Moving columns: Names are cut off - should be longer
excerpt:
When moving items from one board to another, the names of the columns are cut off even though there is loads of space to show the names. 
Changing zoom does nothing.

posts.author: Just1n (🍉 Justin 🍉)
posts.cookedHtml:
When moving items from one board to another, the names of the columns are cut off even though there is loads of space to show the names.
Changing zoom does nothing.
